description: Regression test for false positive fixes in client-like codebase
test_purpose: Verify that legitimate client code patterns are not incorrectly flagged as high-severity security threats

p0_unicode_crash.description: Unicode boundary crash fix in Rust CLI
p0_unicode_crash.test_coverage: Handled by separate Unicode test fixture

p0_node_modules_exclusion.description: Scanner should skip node_modules directories by default
p0_node_modules_exclusion.test_coverage: Verified by separate node_modules exclusion test

p1_regexp_exec_vs_shell.description: RegExp.exec() should not be flagged as dangerous shell execution

p1_eval_context_detection.description: eval() in strings, regex, and comments should not be flagged

p1_documentation_severity.description: Documentation files should have reduced severity (2 levels lower)

p2_charcode_benign.description: Single character String.fromCharCode() should not be flagged as obfuscation

p2_safe_domains.description: API calls to known-safe domains should not be flagged

should_not_detect: eval() references in string literals and regex patterns
Single character String.fromCharCode() for Excel columns
API calls to api.openai.com, api.anthropic.com, api.huggingface.co
Example credentials in documentation files (should have LOW severity only)
should_still_detect: Real eval() call in dangerousExample() function

validation_criteria.documentation_findings: Should have reduced severity (LOW instead of HIGH/CRITICAL)
